entities.tree: a split tree with smoke rising

scenes.title: The Lightning Strike
scenes.background_prompt: An open field, dark storm clouds, heavy rain, and a dirt path.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An open field during a violent thunderstorm. Dark, churning storm clouds fill the sky, and heavy rain falls in sheets. A single tall oak tree stands in the center of the field. A brilliant white-blue bolt of lightning connects the dark clouds to the tree's crown in a jagged, branching line of light so bright it illuminates the entire scene. At the point of impact, the tree's trunk has split cleanly down the middle, the two halves leaning apart, revealing pale raw wood inside. Thin wisps of smoke and steam rise from the split and from charred bark. Splinters of wood are scattered on the wet grass around the base. A dirt path runs across the field in the foreground, puddles forming along its length. The lightning bolt's branching tendrils reach up into the clouds, and a secondary glow reflects off the rain-soaked grass. The scene captures raw cause and effect: bolt strikes tree, tree splits.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place the tree in the center. Place the lightning as a brilliant jagged bolt connecting clouds to the tree's crown. At the impact point, the tree trunk split cleanly down the middle, two halves leaning apart, pale raw wood visible. Wisps of smoke and steam rising from the split.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a lush green meadow is filled with various small wildflowers, including yellow daisies, blue bell-shaped flowers, and tiny white blossoms, interspersed with clumps of three-leaf clovers and broad-leafed plants. To the right, a winding dirt path made of brown earth and scattered grey stones curves from the bottom right corner towards the center of the scene, featuring several shallow puddles reflecting the grey sky. Along the right edge of the path, more wildflowers grow, including clusters of small red and blue blossoms. In the middle ground, a large, thick-trunked tree stands prominently at the end of the path, its brown bark split down the center where a stylized yellow and white lightning bolt strikes it from above. Wisps of light blue and grey smoke rise from the crack in the tree's trunk, which is topped with a canopy of green leaves dotted with small pink and yellow flowers. Behind the tree, the green field continues towards a line of rounded, dark green bushes and trees that stretch across the horizon. The background is dominated by a heavy, dark grey sky filled with thick, swirling storm clouds. A bright, warm glow emanates from behind the central clouds where the lightning originates, casting light onto the scene below. Diagonal lines of rain fall consistently across the entire landscape, from the dark clouds down to the flower-filled meadow and the path. The entire scene is set during a daytime storm, with the dramatic light of the lightning bolt providing the primary focal point.

while the rain falls on the field
